summary: Iteration 82 - Comprehensive testing of report features including MATERIAL COUNTS, GROUNDS TO COVER, comparison table, disclaimer footer, prompt instruction stripping, and we/us/our language sanitization. All 43 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with white background (light mode) and professional styling.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend _strip_report_placeholders function (lines 3420-3504) correctly strips prompt instructions ('— keep ALL', '— DETAILED PATHWAY ANALYSIS', word count parentheses) and sanitizes 30+ we/us/our patterns
Backend report_guardrails (lines 3655-3695) contains comprehensive LANGUAGE RULES section explicitly banning 'we', 'us', 'our', 'them' and requiring third-person educational tone
All 3 report prompts (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log) include MATERIAL COUNTS section with document/timeline/ground counts
All 3 report prompts include GROUNDS TO COVER with 'MUST INCLUDE ALL' instruction
quick_summary prompt includes '## 8. WHAT THE PAID REPORTS ADD' section with $150 and $200 AUD pricing
Frontend cleanAIContent function (lines 110-257) mirrors backend replacements for prompt instructions and we/us/our language
Frontend ReportView has report-comparison-table component (lines 847-907) with FREE/$150/$200 columns and checkmarks
Frontend ReportView has report-footer disclaimer (lines 909-923) with AlertTriangle hazard symbol and 'Not Legal Advice' text
Frontend openReportPreview function (lines 445-629) generates styled HTML with comparison table and disclaimer matching on-screen layout
Notes API endpoint POST /api/cases/{case_id}/notes (lines 2345-2393) properly creates notes with title, content, category fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 features from test request verified: 1) Landing page loads with white background (rgb(255,255,255)) and professional styling, 2) Backend _strip_report_placeholders strips prompt instructions like '— keep ALL outcome pathways', 3) Backend _strip_report_placeholders strips we/us/our language with 30+ regex patterns, 4) Backend report_guardrails contains LANGUAGE RULES section banning 'we/us/our', 5) All 3 report prompts include MATERIAL COUNTS section, 6) All 3 report prompts include GROUNDS TO COVER with 'MUST INCLUDE ALL', 7) quick_summary prompt includes '## 8. WHAT THE PAID REPORTS ADD' with $150/$200 pricing, 8) Frontend cleanAIContent strips prompt instruction text, 9) Frontend ReportView has comparison table with Free/$150/$200 columns and checkmarks, 10) Frontend ReportView has disclaimer footer with AlertTriangle hazard symbol, 11) Frontend print preview HTML includes comparison table and disclaimer, 12) Frontend print preview has styled headers and numbered sections, 13) Notes API endpoint POST /api/cases/{case_id}/notes exists and works, 14) Notes frontend dialog has title, content, category fields, 15) Backend health check returns healthy status.

backend_strip_report_placeholders.strips_keep_all_instructions: PASSED - Regex pattern for '— keep ALL' found
backend_strip_report_placeholders.correct_replacements: PASSED - 'We are arguing' -> 'The applicant argues', etc.
